mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( flag, member_id, wallet_id, type, coin_name, op_type, op_remark, op_value, op_before, op_after, ext_remark ) VALUES ( IFNULL(#{log.flag}, 1), #{log.memberId}, #{log.walletId}, #{log.type}, #{log.coinName}, #{log.opType}, #{log.opRemark}, #{log.opValue}, #{log.opBefore}, #{log.opAfter}, #{log.extRemark} )
